metadata.dataset_name: Cortex Air Mode - Block B Special Cargo Rules
metadata.purpose: Mock/reference dataset for Cortex air-mode R&D agents. Intended to trigger intake questions, hard gates, planning factors, and confidence caps for special cargo.
metadata.legal_note: R&D/mock reference only. Not a production compliance dataset. Replace or validate with current licensed/API data before real commercial use.
metadata.integration_note: Use Block B after Block A. If is_dg_code=true or category implies dangerous goods, cross-check the Block A DG dataset before final recommendation.

category_rules.required_intake_fields: exact product type; required temperature range; allowed excursion tolerance; active/passive packaging; data logger required; max transit time; shipper instruction; 24h contact; origin/destination airport cold-chain capability; carrier pharma acceptance
category_rules.hard_gates: temperature range missing; packaging system unknown; no 24h contact for urgent/temperature-sensitive shipment; no cold-chain capability for airport/handler/carrier; active ULD not approved/compatible; missing permits for controlled medicines/biological products
category_rules.planning_factors: prefer direct/short transit; avoid long tarmac exposure; use active ULD or validated passive shipper; check cold room at origin/transit/destination; use CEIV-capable lane when available; monitor for temperature excursion risk
category_rules.confidence_cap_if_missing: temperature range missing: 45%; packaging unknown: 55%; cold-chain capability unknown: 65%; carrier acceptance unknown: 70%
category_rules.source_docs: WHO temperature-controlled transport supplement; Pharma.Aero CEIV white paper; FAA AC 120-85A active ULD guidance

category_rules.required_intake_fields: exact commodity; fresh/frozen/chilled status; temperature constraint; shelf life/expiry; packaging type; gross weight; dimensions; number of packages; 24h shipper and consignee contact; veterinary/phytosanitary requirement if applicable
category_rules.hard_gates: exact commodity missing; temperature constraint missing for chilled/frozen cargo; packaging unsuitable or unknown; 24h contact missing; required vet/phytosanitary inspection not known; route too slow for shelf life
category_rules.planning_factors: prefer express/prime service; avoid deferred service; require advanced booking; check labels such as PERISHABLE, KEEP COOL, KEEP FROZEN, THIS WAY UP, FRAGILE when relevant; check airport cold storage
category_rules.confidence_cap_if_missing: commodity missing: 40%; temperature unknown: 55%; packaging unknown: 60%; transit time unknown: 65%; inspection/permit unknown: 70%
category_rules.source_docs: Air Cargo Perishable Handling guide; Cargo Agent Handbook references to perishable cargo regulations

category_rules.required_intake_fields: species; quantity; age/condition; container/crate type and dimensions; feeding/watering plan; origin/destination permits; CITES status if wildlife; airline live-animal acceptance; airport animal handling capability; transit time
category_rules.hard_gates: species missing; container/crate details missing; airline acceptance missing; import/export permit unknown; CITES check unknown for wildlife/endangered species; route has excessive journey time or unsuitable connections
category_rules.planning_factors: minimize journey time; avoid long connections; use trained handler; check temperature/ventilation; check welfare and documentation; confirm airline-specific rules
category_rules.confidence_cap_if_missing: species missing: 35%; crate details missing: 45%; permits unknown: 55%; airline acceptance unknown: 60%; animal handling capability unknown: 65%
category_rules.source_docs: Live animal handling process paper; Cargo Agent Handbook live animals/perishables board description

category_rules.category_name: Heavy, outsized, overhang, or special cargo
category_rules.required_intake_fields: piece weight; piece dimensions; number of pieces; center of gravity if known; pallet/ULD type; main deck/lower deck requirement; aircraft type; door dimensions; floor loading/area load limit; restraint/tie-down requirement; loading equipment availability
category_rules.hard_gates: piece weight missing; dimensions missing; aircraft type unknown; door/ULD compatibility unknown; restraint method unknown; floor loading/area load not checked; aircraft W&B not checked
category_rules.planning_factors: evaluate aircraft capability before accepting; check ULD compatibility; check restraint/load plan; check weight and balance; verify cargo loading and supervision; consider main deck freighter for large pieces
category_rules.confidence_cap_if_missing: dimensions missing: 40%; aircraft type unknown: 50%; restraint unknown: 55%; W&B/floor loading unknown: 60%; loading equipment unknown: 70%
category_rules.source_docs: FAA AC 120-85A air cargo operations guidance

category_rules.category_name: Valuable, vulnerable, secured, or high-risk cargo
category_rules.required_intake_fields: declared value; commodity description; security status; screening status; known/regulated shipper status; destination PLACI requirement; secure storage requirement; controlled handover requirement; insurance status; carrier/security acceptance
category_rules.hard_gates: security status unknown; not screened/secured and intended for passenger aircraft; PLACI data missing for regulated destination; EU-bound cargo from non-EU origin without ACC3/secure supply chain check; declared value/insurance unknown for valuable cargo
category_rules.planning_factors: secure storage; chain of custody; screening/prescreening; advance cargo data; controlled handover; avoid unnecessary transit; flag theft/tamper risk
category_rules.confidence_cap_if_missing: security status unknown: 45%; screening status unknown: 55%; PLACI data unknown: 65%; secure storage unknown for VAL/VUN: 70%; insurance unknown: 75%
category_rules.source_docs: IATA Air Cargo Security position paper

category_rules.category_name: Human organs, blood, urgent medical / save human life
category_rules.required_intake_fields: material type; temperature range; time critical deadline; packaging/validated shipper; medical/health documentation; 24h emergency contact; priority booking; ramp transfer requirement; destination clearance
category_rules.hard_gates: deadline missing; temperature range missing; packaging unknown; no 24h contact; no priority/ramp transfer plan for critical timing; import/health clearance unknown
category_rules.planning_factors: fastest routing; priority handling; quick ramp transfer; temperature monitoring; avoid multi-stop routes; coordinate consignee readiness before arrival
category_rules.confidence_cap_if_missing: deadline missing: 40%; temperature missing: 50%; 24h contact missing: 55%; clearance unknown: 65%
category_rules.source_docs: Special handling codes; WHO temperature-controlled transport supplement; Perishable handling guide

category_rules.required_intake_fields: country pair; death certificate; embalming/health certificate if required; coffin/container type; consular/import permit if required; airline acceptance; funeral agent/consignee contact
category_rules.hard_gates: documents unknown; carrier acceptance unknown; country import/transit rules unknown; packaging/coffin details missing
category_rules.planning_factors: coordinate with airline and destination agent; check transit restrictions; avoid unnecessary connections; handle discreetly
category_rules.confidence_cap_if_missing: documents unknown: 50%; carrier acceptance unknown: 60%; country rules unknown: 65%
category_rules.source_docs: Special handling codes; authored R&D rule

category_rules.category_name: Wet material, leakage risk, obnoxious cargo
category_rules.required_intake_fields: liquid/wet content; packaging watertightness; odor/leakage risk; orientation requirement; absorbent material; compatibility with other cargo
category_rules.hard_gates: packaging unknown; leakage risk unmanaged; strong odor/contamination risk not assessed
category_rules.planning_factors: use watertight packaging; orientation labels; segregate from sensitive cargo; check carrier acceptance for odor/leakage risk
category_rules.confidence_cap_if_missing: packaging unknown: 55%; leakage risk unknown: 60%; carrier acceptance unknown: 75%
category_rules.source_docs: Special handling codes; perishable packaging guidance

category_rules.category_name: Diagnostic specimens, biological substances, infectious substances
category_rules.required_intake_fields: UN/category if applicable; sample type; packaging instruction; temperature requirement; dry ice use; shipper declaration if required; origin/destination health permits; carrier DG acceptance
category_rules.hard_gates: classification missing; UN/category unknown; packaging unknown; temperature unknown if refrigerated/frozen; DG acceptance unknown for infectious substance
category_rules.planning_factors: cross-check Block A DG table; apply temperature-control rules if needed; check dry ice quantity if used; ensure documentation and labels
category_rules.confidence_cap_if_missing: classification missing: 35%; packaging unknown: 45%; DG acceptance unknown: 55%; temperature unknown: 65%
category_rules.source_docs: Special handling codes; Block A DG dataset; WHO supplement

category_rules.required_intake_fields: active ULD model; approval/compatibility; battery/power status; operating instructions; temperature set point; aircraft type; ULD position; maintenance/serviceability status
category_rules.hard_gates: active ULD not approved/compatible; operating instructions missing; battery/power state unknown; aircraft compatibility unknown
category_rules.planning_factors: verify ULD certificate/approval; check aircraft W&B/ULD compatibility; confirm recharge/ground handling; monitor set point and operating duration
category_rules.confidence_cap_if_missing: ULD model unknown: 50%; aircraft compatibility unknown: 55%; operating duration unknown: 65%; serviceability unknown: 70%
category_rules.source_docs: FAA AC 120-85A active ULD and temperature-controlled container guidance

confidence_rules.message: Temperature-sensitive cargo cannot be assessed confidently without a required temperature range.
Perishable cargo requires exact commodity because handling, labels, and shelf-life differ.
Live animal cargo requires species and container/crate details before route suitability can be assessed.
Heavy/outsized cargo cannot be assessed without piece dimensions and piece weight.
Special cargo requires aircraft/ULD compatibility and loading constraints before acceptance.
Security-sensitive cargo needs screening/secure supply-chain status before passenger/all-cargo suitability is assessed.
Valuable/vulnerable cargo should not receive high confidence without secure storage and chain-of-custody checks.
Urgent medical cargo needs hard deadline and 24-hour contact details.
Human remains require country documents and airline acceptance validation.
Medical specimens/infectious substances require classification and packaging checks, with Block A DG cross-check if applicable.
